full_suite.command: python3 -m json.tool runs/lanes/dr_viewer_20260710/report.json >/dev/null && python3 -c 'import json, jsonschema; jsonschema.validate(json.load(open("runs/lanes/dr_viewer_20260710/report.json")), json.load(open("docs/racketsport/lane_report.schema.json")))' && git diff --check -- runs/lanes/dr_viewer_20260710 && git status --short -- runs/lanes/dr_viewer_20260710

honest_issues: This is an audit PASS, not a capability promotion. REPLAY/STATS remains unverified; VERIFIED=0 is unchanged.
No new browser/hardware performance run was launched. Existing headless FPS proves the demo capture environment and renderer sensitivity, not current live Mac/iPhone FPS.
Mesh/skeleton grid coverage assumes instantaneous availability of the correct mesh chunk; real async chunk loading can only make mesh coverage worse.

The W7 owner-critique manifest/world bundle referenced by viewer_verify is no longer retained in that directory; the retained headless report records Players=0, 46.2 FPS, and zero trust chips, and the demo report records the BODY failure.

Paddle corner/marker GT was unavailable. Stale hold, low-confidence pose provenance, and crude geometry are proven, but coordinate-transform error remains a hypothesis requiring reprojection/GT evidence.
The historical Outdoor 5.21 to 21.32 mesh-FPS result was read only from non-label archived status evidence; protected Outdoor/Indoor labels were not accessed.
The code permits ball-trail connections across segment changes up to 1.75 seconds; direct proof that a rendered demo line crosses a specifically suppressed segment remains pending.
No tests were run because the lane is read-only and the spec names no source blast-radius suite; deliverable syntax, JSON schema, diff whitespace, and write scope were validated instead.
next: Prioritize a true 30/60-Hz demo capture and hardware viewer profile, then enforce the per-player geometry invariant, reject stale paddle holds, resolve all manifest assets relative to the manifest, and mount fail-safe compact per-entity trust badges before another owner demo.
